problem_refined: HR onboarding takes 14 days via manual email and paper. 50 hires/month need Email, Slack, HRIS access on day 1 but provisioning delays average 4 days. Goal: reduce to 2 days with zero access delays.

requirements.text: The system shall automate employee onboarding workflow.
The system shall provision system access within 4 hours.
requirements.edited_text: The system shall provision all required system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation.

requirements.text: The system shall support 50 concurrent onboarding processes.
The system shall integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack.
requirements.rationale: Day-1 access to all required systems

requirements.text: The system shall send SMS notifications.
requirements.rationale: Out of scope for this phase

brd_draft:
# Business Requirements Document

## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
The objective of this project is to automate the HR onboarding process to significantly reduce the time taken from 14 days to 2 days. By implementing an automated system that provisions necessary access within 2 hours, we aim to eliminate delays and enhance the new hire experience on their first day.

## 2. BUSINESS PROBLEM
The current onboarding process is inefficient, taking an average of 14 days due to manual email and paper processes. Key pain points include a 4-day delay in IT access provisioning, which affects 50 new hires each month. This results in a lack of visibility into the onboarding status and a significant allocation of HR resources to repetitive tasks.

## 3. BUSINESS GOALS
1. Reduce the onboarding time from 14 days to 2 days (aligned with REQ-001).
2. Automate IT access provisioning to ensure all required system access is granted within 2 hours of onboarding initiation (aligned with REQ-002).
3. Support 50 concurrent onboarding processes to handle the monthly hire volume effectively (aligned with REQ-003).
4. Integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack to provide day-1 access to all required systems (aligned with REQ-004).

## 4. SCOPE
### In Scope:
- Automation of the employee onboarding workflow (REQ-001).
- Provisioning of system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation (REQ-002).
- Support for 50 concurrent onboarding processes (REQ-003).
- Integration with HRIS, Email, and Slack (REQ-004).

### Out of Scope:
- Manual onboarding processes and paperwork.
- Any systems or processes not directly related to the onboarding workflow.

## 5. STAKEHOLDERS
| Role          | Team | Involvement                | Impact                       |
|---------------|------|----------------------------|------------------------------|
| HR Manager    | HR   | Oversee onboarding process  | High                         |
| IT Department  | IT   | Implement access provisioning| High                         |
| New Employees | HR   | Complete onboarding         | High                         |

## 6. FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS
- [REQ-001] The system shall automate employee onboarding workflow.
- [REQ-002] The system shall provision all required system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation.

## 7. NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS
- [REQ-003] The system shall support 50 concurrent onboarding processes.

## 8. INTEGRATION REQUIREMENTS
- [REQ-004] The system shall integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack.

## 9. ASSUMPTIONS & RISKS
### Assumptions:
- The integration with existing systems (HRIS, Email, and Slack) will be seamless and will not require extensive modifications.
- All stakeholders will be available for training and implementation support.

### Risks:
- Potential resistance from HR and IT staff to adopt the new automated processes.
- Technical challenges during the integration phase that may delay project timelines.

## 10. SUCCESS METRICS
- Reduction in onboarding time to 2 days as measured from initiation to completion.
- Achievement of 100% system access provisioning within 2 hours for all new hires.
- Positive feedback from new employees regarding their onboarding experience.

---
## TRACEABILITY MATRIX
| REQ ID | Requirement                                                       | Type           | Source          | Status |
|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------|------------------|--------|
| REQ-001| The system shall automate employee onboarding workflow.           | Functional     | Knowledge base   | Approved |
| REQ-002| The system shall provision all required system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation. | Functional     | Gap answer       | Approved |
| REQ-003| The system shall support 50 concurrent onboarding processes.      | Non-Functional | Clarification answer | Approved |
| REQ-004| The system shall integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack.          | Integration     | Knowledge base   | Approved |

---
